weekly_summary: Over the past 7 days, our security landscape has been characterized by 18 total findings across 12 unique CVEs, with CVE-2026-42208 being the most frequently seen. The majority of these vulnerabilities were observed on May 7, indicating a peak in malicious activity. Our analysis reveals that multiple security domains were affected, including Browser Extensions, Cloud/IAM, Containers/K8s, and Web/Servers, among others. The diversity of impacted domains suggests a broad range of potential attack vectors, underscoring the need for continued vigilance and proactive measures to mitigate emerging threats.
